name: GODKILLER: Last Hope
overview: This is not a story about killing gods. GODKILLER: LAST HOPE is Transplanar RPG's first ever in-studio actual play series. Episodes premiere weekly Saturdays at 8pm ET. LAST HOPE is a standalone series and perfect for those new to our campaigns, though it is set in the same world as Arc Two of The Chaos Protocol. LAST HOPE utilizes Godkiller RPG by Connie Chang. The ashcan is available at http://byconniechang.itch.io/ and the full game will be published with Evil Hat Productions in 2025.

trailers.title: GODKILLER: Last Hope Trailer | a divine tale of vengeance
